report.summary: Cycle 7 standup (Mar 28 late night). BTC $66,194 (+$186 from v6, $66K support holding with slight bounce). ETH ~$1,999 (+$22, flirting with $2K again). F&G 10-12 (Extreme Fear, 48-50 day streak nearing all-time record). DELTA: Uncommitted files 320→333 (+13 from reports). Published pages 585→590 (+5 promoted: crypto cards + wallet reviews). build-5 shipped Starknet Validity Rollup + ETF In-Kind Redemption guides. design-v6 created 4 OG images + breadcrumbs. community-v7 drafted tweets #223-225 + Newsletter v38 + staking reclassification social card. All 6 agents ran last hour. 33 total agent runs today. Deploy blocked 17th consecutive cycle.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: $66,194 (+$186 from last cycle's $66,008, +0.3%). Slight bounce but still testing $66K support. Down 24.5% YTD, 47.5% from Oct 2025 ATH ($126K). Iran oil chokepoint threats + $14B options expiry triggered $450M liquidations and 122K trader wipeouts. 10Y Treasury near 4.5%, DXY up 0.57% WoW — macro headwinds persist.

ETH: ~$1,999 (+$22 from $1,977, +1.1%). Flirting with $2K reclaim after 3+ days below. Down 60% from Aug 2025 high ($4,953). SOL leading declines at -4.1% today. ETH/BTC ratio still at multi-year lows ~0.030. Analysts targeting $2,200-$2,400 recovery if resistance breaks.

F&G INDEX: 10-12 (Extreme Fear). Sources vary: CoinMarketCap 10, BitcoinWorld 12, BlockchainMagazine 12. 48-50 day streak — within 2 days of all-time record (post-FTX Nov 2022). Market shed $80B since Mar 24. Total market cap ~$2.37T.

DELTA FROM CYCLE 6 (standup-v6): BTC $66,008→$66,194 (+0.3%). ETH $1,977→$1,999 (+1.1%). F&G stable 10-12. Uncommitted files 320→333 (+13, all report files). Published pages 585→590 (+5 promoted). 2 new learn guides built + 4 OG images + 3 tweets + Newsletter v38 + social card. No new commits. No new deploys.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE 7 OF MARCH 28. Six full rotations (all 6 agents) completed + partial cycle 7. 32 agent runs prior + this standup = 33 total today. Breakdown: standup×7, build×5, publish×3, design×6, community×6, eod×6.

WHAT SHIPPED SINCE CYCLE 6: build-5 created 2 new learn guides — Starknet Validity Rollup Guide 2026 ($542M TVL, Grinta upgrade, S-two prover, STRK staking, BTCFi) and Crypto ETF In-Kind Redemptions Guide 2026 (SEC July 2025 approval, $50B+ projected flows, tax efficiency). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. design-v6 created 4 OG images (Starknet, ETF In-Kind, Citrea, Paradex) + added breadcrumb nav to 2 new pages + fixed OG refs on 2 existing pages. community-v7 drafted tweets #223-225 (Solana LST + RWA yield guides, Lido DAO staking reclassification, week-ahead catalysts) + Newsletter v38 'The Staking Reclassification' + SVG social card. publish-v3 promoted 5 pages (nexo-vs-crypto-com, fold-vs-coinbase-card, plutus-card review, zengo wallet, zerion wallet). eod-v6 ran QA: 0 regressions, 333 files pending, 590 published slugs, 485 page.tsx (82.2% coverage).

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (CRITICAL): (1) Deploy — 333 uncommitted files (+13 from cycle 6), 17th cycle flagging P0. HEAD still at 21aaf5b (Mar 25). (2) 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items still blocked (wallet security slug mismatch + restaking no page.tsx). (3) 105 legacy published slugs missing page.tsx (~82% coverage at 485/590). (4) 145 TS errors in 6 files (stable, non-blocking JSX syntax). (5) 0/6 API routes rate-limited. (6) 5 promoted pages missing JSON-LD structured data.
GIT STATUS: HEAD at 21aaf5b (unchanged since Mar 25). 333 files pending (31 modified + 302 untracked). All changes additive — zero destructive modifications.

PUBLISHED PAGES: 590 slugs in config (+5 promoted this cycle). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items (both blocked). Content velocity today: 14+ pages built across 5 build cycles. 225 tweets drafted cumulative. 38 newsletter versions. 20+ OG images created today.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 17TH CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 333 uncommitted files spanning 3+ days. Every page, OG image, schema fix, and metadata improvement is invisible to production. Google cannot index any of the 14+ pages built today. Morgan Stanley MSBT + SEC commodity ruling + staking reclassification content is time-sensitive — news cycle window closing. Jefe: one git commit + push unlocks everything. 5-minute action, highest possible leverage.

PRIORITY 2 — CAPITALIZE ON FEAR STREAK APPROACHING ALL-TIME RECORD: F&G at 10-12 for 48-50 consecutive days — 2 days from breaking the all-time record (post-FTX Nov 2022). This is a major narrative moment. Our Fear & Greed Timeline page should be the #1 search result when this record breaks. Ensure content is deployed and optimized before the milestone hits (est. Mon-Tue).

PRIORITY 3 — FIX PUBLISH BLOCKERS + JSON-LD GAPS: 2 blocked queue items (wallet-security slug mismatch, restaking missing page.tsx) are quick fixes. Additionally, the 5 pages promoted this cycle by publish-v3 are missing JSON-LD structured data — adding BreadcrumbList + Review schemas would improve rich snippet eligibility. Rate limiter for 6 API routes remains unprotected.
